arts.ttl: Watch: Barcelona star put through the ‘tunnel of slaps’ in training
arts.sum: A member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was subjected to the ‘tunnel of slaps’ at the club’s training ground on Friday. The player in question? Ronald…

arts.ttl: ‘That’s why he’s No.1’ - Hansi Flick hails ‘fantastic’ Szczesny
arts.sum: But Szczesny has more than proven he was the right man for the job, and his coach was full of praise for his performance in Lisbon in a press conference on Friday and revealed the process behind making the decision to make Tek the starting shot-stopper. The Pole had to wait his turn after coming out of retirement but was given the job at the beginning of the new year, and Hansi Flick’s decision to make Szczesny the number one goalkeeper over Iñaki Peña was controversial to say the least at the time.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick singles Barcelona star out for special praise after Benfica clash
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Friday moved to lavish praise on Wojciech Szczęsny. This comes owing to the Pole’s performance in the Champions League in midweek. Szczęsny, for…

arts.ttl: Pedri to rest? Hansi Flick confirms plans to rotate against Osasuna
arts.sum: The Catalans played 70 minutes without 10 men in Lisbon and have another clash with Benfica and a monster league game away to Atlético Madrid next week, so it’s only natural to wonder if Hansi Flick will make changes to his side against an Osasuna team currently sitting in mid-table. Barcelona have no time to rest after their amazing win over Benfica in Champions League action in midweek and turn their focus to La Liga when they meet Osasuna at the Montjuïc Olympic Stadium on Saturday night.

arts.sum: Multiple managers have recently hailed Barcelona's star man this season as one of the best players in the world.
